meta.title: Financing & EMI reality
meta.disclaimer: Illustrative numbers only. Actual loan rates, tenure, and eligibility depend on the bank, co-applicant, collateral, and RBI policy. Verify with your bank and a qualified financial advisor before signing.

intro: Education loans and EMIs are where many families feel stuck. This page gives simple ballpark EMI math and honest pointers — then sends you to ROI and Salary Explorer for the full career picture.
scholarship_pointers: National Scholarship Portal (NSP) — central and state schemes in one place; check income and category criteria every year.
College-specific merit / sports scholarships — read the institute's official admission brochure PDF, not WhatsApp forwards.
If you are preparing for competitive exams, some coaching institutes publish fee waivers for top diagnostic scores — verify on their official site only.
loan_notes: Prefer education loans marketed for students (moratorium during study) over personal loans unless a CA has compared total cost.
A longer tenure lowers EMI but increases total interest — use the slider below to see the trade-off.
Co-applicant (parent) income and CIBIL score heavily affect approval in India — discuss early with your family.
